subcodes.first_line: O Thou who bearest My name, the All-Bountiful! Hearken unto that which the Lord of creation doth call thee, then bear witness unto that which God hath borne witness in eternity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمنا الجواد اسمع ما یدعوک مالک الایجاد ثم اشهد بما شهد الله فی ازل
